title: Phuntsholing Heat Wave
lead: Phuntsholing is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.63. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Phuntsholing has resulted in a high Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.7 GG, indicating a significant need for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 78%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 3.8 km/h, which can trap heat and contribute to the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
